title.en: REPRESENTATION OF MUSIC; RECORDING MUSIC IN NOTATION FORM; ACCESSORIES FOR MUSIC OR MUSICAL INSTRUMENTS NOT OTHERWISE PROVIDED FOR, e.g. SUPPORTS (music stands A47B; non-musical aspects of musical toy instruments A63H5/00; metronomes G04F5/02; teaching music G09B15/00)
Means for the representation of music
Chord or note indicators, fixed or adjustable, for keyboard of fingerboards
Recording music in notation form, e.g. recording the mechanical operation of a musical instrument
Supports for musical instruments {(cellopins or components therefor G10D3/01)}
{while playing, e.g. cord, strap or harness (rests or guards as part of the instruments, see the particular instruments, e.g. G10D3/18)}
Other auxiliary devices or accessories, e.g. conductors' batons or separate holders for resin or strings
{Carrying cases for musical instruments (interior fittings for luggage A45C13/02)}
